meaning: v.猛地吸住,突然折断,使劈啪地晌,猛咬n.猛咬,突然折断,劈啪声adj.突然的
examples: She closed her purse with a snap.
Snap! I've just bought that CD too!
Buyers tried to snap up protection by amounts roughly in line with established positions.
Instead of tollbooths London is using digital cameras that snap license plate photos as vehicles pass underneath.
